description_long: This is a dark green, polygonal bottle with a tall, narrow neck and a wider, faceted body. The bottle has a flat base and a short, slightly raised lip at the top, suggesting it is designed to be sealed with a cap. The surface appears matte and uniform, with no visible labels, branding, or decorative elements. The bottle's proportions and shape are reminiscent of a standard glass beverage bottle, commonly found in urban environments such as streets, parks, or recycling bins. The object appears solid and sturdy, with no visible signs of damage or wear. Its overall design is utilitarian and functional, suitable for holding liquids.
description: A dark green, faceted bottle with a tall neck and flat base, featuring a matte, label-free surface. The shape is typical of a standard beverage bottle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's polygonal body and tall neck, with the flat base and short lip clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, this view maintains the same features but reveals more of the bottle's faceted sides.
description_view_2: Another rotated angle, similar to previous views, highlighting the uniformity and symmetry of the bottle's shape.
description_view_3: This view completes the rotation, again showing the faceted body and tall neck, with no additional features visible.
